title: 84% of Financial Firms Prioritize Tokenization as Strategic Move
summary: A Broadridge survey reveals that 84% of financial firms now consider tokenization a strategic priority, with Wall Street accelerating efforts to integrate digital assets with traditional finance and betting on hybrid markets where both coexist.
body:
A recent survey by Broadridge Financial Solutions found that 84% of financial firms now consider tokenization a strategic priority. This marks a significant shift as Wall Street accelerates efforts to integrate digital assets with traditional finance. The survey highlights a growing bet on hybrid markets where tokenized assets and conventional financial instruments coexist.

The survey details that firms are increasingly exploring tokenization to enhance liquidity, reduce operational costs, and create new investment opportunities. Key areas of focus include tokenizing real estate, private equity, and other illiquid assets. Broadridge's findings suggest that the financial industry is rapidly adopting blockchain technology to modernize its infrastructure.

For everyday investors, this shift could mean more accessible and flexible investment options. Tokenization could democratize access to high-value assets like real estate or fine art, which have traditionally been out of reach for many. As more assets become tokenized, investors may see increased liquidity and lower barriers to entry in various markets.

The next steps for financial firms will likely involve pilot projects and partnerships to test tokenization in real-world scenarios. Investors should watch for announcements from major financial institutions about their tokenization initiatives, as these could signal new opportunities and changes in the investment landscape. The timeline for widespread adoption remains uncertain, but the momentum is clearly building.
twitterThread: 84% of financial firms now see tokenization as a strategic priority. Wall Street is betting big on hybrid markets where digital and traditional assets coexist.
Tokenization could make high-value assets like real estate more accessible to everyday investors. Firms are exploring ways to enhance liquidity and reduce costs.

Watch for pilot projects from major financial institutions as they test tokenization in real-world scenarios. The future of investing could be more flexible and inclusive. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-07-18-84-of-financial-firms-prioritize-tokenization-as-strategic-move
standaloneTweet: 84% of financial firms are prioritizing tokenization, aiming to blend digital and traditional assets. This could open up new investment opportunities for everyone.
